시편 6:1.content: Yahweh, don’t rebuke me in your anger, neither discipline me in your wrath.

시편 6:2.content: Have mercy on me, Yahweh, for I am faint. Yahweh, heal me, for my bones are troubled.

시편 6:3.content: My soul is also in great anguish. But you, Yahweh—how long?

시편 6:4.content: Return, Yahweh. Deliver my soul, and save me for your loving kindness’ sake.

시편 6:5.content: For in death there is no memory of you. In Sheol, who shall give you thanks?

시편 6:6.content: I am weary with my groaning. Every night I flood my bed. I drench my couch with my tears.

시편 6:7.content: My eye wastes away because of grief. It grows old because of all my adversaries.

시편 6:8.content: Depart from me, all you workers of iniquity, for Yahweh has heard the voice of my weeping.

시편 6:9.content: Yahweh has heard my supplication. Yahweh accepts my prayer.

시편 6:10.content: May all my enemies be ashamed and dismayed. They shall turn back, they shall be disgraced suddenly.
